creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm sorry I could not help with that.  Mixing 32-bit and 64-bit on FreeBSD
sadly is fragile and tricky compared to the likes of Fedora and openSUSE.

(In reply to alt2600 from comment #2)
> should one have to do anything special on an amd64 host using an
> i386 poudriere jail to build this i386 package?

Not to my knowledge.
